name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Used when two parties need to share confidential information and both require protection. Covers standard terms for confidentiality, permitted disclosures, and term length.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: The cover page template for the Mutual NDA. Parties fill in their names, governing law, and other deal-specific terms before signing. Incorporates the Mutual-NDA standard terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A comprehensive agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Covers subscription terms, order forms, acceptable use, data handling, warranties, and liability. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys from vendors, procurement teams, and law firms.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for early-stage product partnerships where a vendor engages a design partner to test and provide feedback on a product before general availability. Covers feedback rights, confidentiality, and IP ownership.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: A standard SLA designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Defines uptime commitments, service credits, measurement methodology, and exclusions for cloud and SaaS products.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: A standard agreement for engaging professional services such as consulting, implementation, or custom development. Covers SOW terms, deliverables, IP ownership, payment, and warranties. Designed for technology vendors and service providers.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A GDPR-compliant DPA governing how a data processor handles personal data on behalf of a data controller. Covers processing instructions, sub-processors, security measures, data subject rights, and data transfers.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A standard agreement for licensing on-premise or perpetual software. Covers license grants, restrictions, support terms, fees, IP ownership, warranties, and limitations of liability. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard agreement governing a business partnership between two companies, including referral, reseller, or co-sell arrangements. Covers partner obligations, revenue sharing, IP rights, and term and termination.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract. Covers pilot scope, duration, fees (if any), confidentiality, and transition to a full agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A HIPAA-compliant BAA that governs how a business associate handles protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity. Covers permitted uses, safeguards, breach notification, and subcontractor obligations.

name: AI Addendum
description: An addendum to be used alongside a primary software or services agreement when the product incorporates AI or machine learning. Covers AI-specific terms including acceptable use, training data, output ownership, hallucination disclaimers, and model governance.
